sections.changelog:
4.5.2

  • Inject player after hero figure when present, fall back to before first paragraph
  • Disable JS mover fallback so player is always server-side rendered (fixes WP Rocket Delay JS hiding the player on cached page loads)

    • 4.5.1

    • Fix: plugin upgrade detection now reads version from partner config so clear_page_cache_on_upgrade actually fires on release

      • 4.5.0

      • Switch to WordPress-native injection for reliable server-side player injection
      • Enable automatic WP Rocket page cache purge on plugin upgrade
